raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags several internal inconsistencies and unsupported claims, but does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Patel and Rajagopal) and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (the Patel and Rajagopal paper), but does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with no drifts detected.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.2
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags several internal inconsistencies and unsupported claims, but does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Patel and Rajagopal) and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (the Patel and Rajagopal paper), but does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with no drifts detected.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
